steps.title: Use hemisphere volume
steps.content:
A hemisphere is half of a sphere, so its volume is
$$
V=\frac{2}{3}\pi r^3
$$
With radius $79$, this becomes
$$
V=\frac{2}{3}\pi(79)^3
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the volume
steps.content: Compute the power and multiply: $79^3=493{,}039$. Then $V=\frac{2}{3}\pi(493{,}039)$, which is about $1{,}032{,}600$. The answer is D.
